# Ciphertext RSA — cada número es un byte cifrado: c = m^e mod n
# Descifra cada uno: m = c^d mod n → chr(m)

35052328,22271299,52920117,58471634,44240802,7062297,35465995,28706700,13269390,44240802,31621302,67049974,30135115,44240802,28706700,22865087,49700552,49274517,34287145,35465995,22865087,34287145,49700552,62169525
